steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage states that infrared heating results in “reducing industrial cooking times” when compared to conventional methods. This comparison reveals the disadvantage.

steps.title: Match the signal to the answer
steps.content: If infrared reduces cooking times, then conventional methods must have longer cooking times as their disadvantage. The other three choices mention issues—technological breakdown, size limitations, and energy requirements—that the passage never discusses. That matches choice C — C is correct.
